name: build-harmony-apps
description: Build HarmonyOS apps with DevEco CodeGenie, ArkTS and ArkUI workflows for debugging, preview, profiling, memory, intents, multi-device UI, testing, and refactoring.

interface.shortDescription: Build, refine, profile, test, and debug HarmonyOS apps with ArkTS, ArkUI, and DevEco workflows
interface.longDescription: Use Build Harmony Apps to create projects, build and run apps, inspect and automate device UI, diagnose ArkTS compiler and runtime failures, preview multi-device layouts, implement native ArkUI patterns, expose Intents Kit actions, triage tests, analyze DevEco Profiler traces, and prove memory fixes with before/after evidence.
defaultPrompt: Build or debug this HarmonyOS app with ArkTS, ArkUI, and DevEco tools.
